Label Redesign · Round 1

Recovery Mist™ — Burn Relief Spray

The previous label, rebuilt in the current DermaSoZo brand system — one version for each Round 4 logo option.

What changed from the old label

  • Old "DS" mark & maroon circles replaced with the Round 4 crest and a layered lotus watermark in the corner for depth
  • Brand palette applied: Deep Teal, Coral Sunset, Navy on a warm blush ground
  • Product now leads as Recovery Mist™, with "Burn Relief Spray · Topical Analgesic" kept as the regulatory identity line
  • Typography upgraded to the brand system — DM Serif Display + Karla
  • Drug Facts panel preserved verbatim in FDA format — all uses, warnings, directions and ingredients unchanged
  • Same overall label dimensions as the original artwork; print-ready vector masters on file
Option A

Stacked crest — Cascading Coral lotus (navy derma)

Option B

Stacked crest — Cascading Coral lotus (coral derma)

Option C

Stacked crest — White-Line Coral lotus (navy derma)

Option D

Stacked crest — White-Line Coral lotus (coral derma)

Option E

Horizontal lockup — Cascading Coral lotus

Option F

Horizontal lockup — White-Line Coral lotus
